mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM products
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(pay_amount), 0) FROM orders WHERE status IN (1, 2, 3) AND DATE(create_time) = CURDATE()
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders WHERE status = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM aftersales WHERE status IN ('SUBMITTED', 'PROCESSING')
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM products WHERE stock <= #{threshold} AND status != 0

SELECT o.id AS id, o.order_no AS orderNo, o.pay_amount AS payAmount, o.status AS status, o.create_time AS createTime, u.account AS userAccount, u.nickname AS userNickname FROM orders o LEFT JOIN users u ON o.user_id = u.id ORDER BY o.create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT * FROM products WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT * FROM product_media WHERE product_id = #{productId} ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC
SELECT * FROM product_skus WHERE product_id = #{productId} ORDER BY id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO product_media(product_id, url, sort_order) VALUES (#{productId}, #{url}, #{sortOrder})
INSERT INTO product_skus(product_id, attrs, price, stock) VALUES (#{productId}, #{attrs}, #{price}, #{stock})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM categories ORDER BY parent_id ASC, id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO categories(name, parent_id, create_time) VALUES (#{name}, #{parentId}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT o.id AS id, o.user_id AS userId, o.order_no AS orderNo, o.total_amount AS totalAmount, o.pay_amount AS payAmount, o.status AS status, o.address_id AS addressId, o.logistics_company AS logisticsCompany, o.logistics_no AS logisticsNo, o.create_time AS createTime, o.update_time AS updateTime, u.account AS userAccount, u.nickname AS userNickname FROM orders o LEFT JOIN users u ON o.user_id = u.id WHERE o.id = #{id}

SELECT id AS id, order_id AS orderId, product_id AS productId, sku_id AS skuId, product_name AS productName, product_image AS productImage, price AS price, quantity AS quantity, total_amount AS totalAmount, create_time AS createTime FROM order_items WHERE order_id = #{orderId} ORDER BY id ASC
SELECT id AS id, user_id AS userId, receiver AS receiver, phone AS phone, region AS region, detail AS detail, is_default AS isDefault FROM user_addresses WHERE id = #{addressId}

SELECT id AS id, order_id AS orderId, trade_id AS tradeId, channel AS channel, amount AS amount, status AS status, paid_at AS paidAt, create_time AS createTime FROM payments WHERE order_id = #{orderId} ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE orders SET status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE orders SET status = 2, logistics_company = #{logisticsCompany}, logistics_no = #{logisticsNo}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT a.id AS id, a.user_id AS userId, a.order_id AS orderId, a.order_item_id AS orderItemId, a.qty AS qty, a.evidence AS evidence, a.type AS type, a.reason AS reason, a.status AS status, a.admin_remark AS adminRemark, a.create_time AS createTime, a.update_time AS updateTime, u.account AS userAccount, u.nickname AS userNickname, o.order_no AS orderNo FROM aftersales a LEFT JOIN users u ON a.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN orders o ON a.order_id = o.id WHERE a.id = #{id}

SELECT u.id AS id, u.account AS account, u.nickname AS nickname, u.avatar AS avatar, u.role AS role, u.status AS status, u.create_time AS createTime, u.update_time AS updateTime, COUNT(DISTINCT o.id) AS orderCount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN o.status IN (1, 2, 3) THEN o.pay_amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS totalSpent, COUNT(DISTINCT a.id) AS aftersaleCount FROM users u LEFT JOIN orders o ON u.id = o.user_id LEFT JOIN aftersales a ON u.id = a.user_id WHERE u.id = #{id} GROUP BY u.id, u.account, u.nickname, u.avatar, u.role, u.status, u.create_time, u.update_time
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
